name: chain_i_ran_my_bots_trade_history_against_the
method:
i ran my bot's trade history against the actual outcomes of 14,000 events

it wasn't predicting the future

it was predicting when other bots would panic-sell

$187K profit in 6 weeks. not from readin

stages.task: Extract core concept: second-order bot-behavior prediction on Polymarket. Strip hype, keep the framework: identify panic-sell signatures in order flow, front-run liquidation cascades
Convert into 3 posts: (1) contrarian take thread on reading machines not markets, (2) breakdown of bot-vs-bot dynamics on prediction markets, (3) what retail traders miss about algorithmic order flow
Score posts for engagement potential, add to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/ with platform routing (Twitter primary, LinkedIn secondary)
